audit_summary.original_problem_1: GT kinship high-depth constraints could block strict-core benchmark generation.
audit_summary.original_problem_2: small-batch model eval and CDM/IRT were too close to mandatory Stage4 gates.
audit_summary.original_problem_3: template/metric/answer-program subskills had overlapping responsibilities with parent runtime.
audit_summary.original_problem_4: packaged data/test.jsonl previously exposed hidden answer/provenance fields.
audit_summary.revision_principle: minimum executable core is mandatory; high-depth/model-eval/statistical diagnostics are optional unless explicitly required by Stage4 plan.

skill_status.redundancy_fix: does not generate templates or code

skill_status.purpose: evidence graph and optional high-depth chains
skill_status.redundancy_fix: no longer blocks strict-core when distant chains are absent

skill_status.purpose: select enabled/disabled templates from parent registry
skill_status.redundancy_fix: does not generate full item code
no hidden GT reread or mandatory model judge

skill_status.purpose: thin generated adapter and CLI generation
skill_status.redundancy_fix: no full parent runtime copy into child generator

skill_status.purpose: deterministic scorer smoke mandatory; external model eval optional
skill_status.redundancy_fix: does not block when model_config missing unless plan requires

skill_status.purpose: statistical diagnosis only when matrix sufficient

skill_status.redundancy_fix: separates model-visible questions from hidden ground_truth
